name: 01_terminal_dawn
label: 报错·破晓
prompt: Dark coding terminal screen filling the frame, cascading red error text glowing in darkness. At the bottom a single line turns brilliant gold: 'errcode: 0, ok'. Hands on keyboard silhouetted below. Atmospheric light fog rising from screen. Dunhuang cyberpunk color palette: deep indigo void, amber gold light. Cinematic widescreen 16:9 landscape, 4K quality, highly detailed.

name: 02_hidden_tag
label: 隐藏标签·顿悟
prompt: Extreme close-up of HTML source code on dark terminal screen, rows of dim gray code stretching across the frame. One single line blazes with golden light: 'mp-common-mpaudio voice_encode_fileid'. A focused beam of warm amber light breaks through darkness onto this line like a revelation. Hard sci-fi meets Chinese ink wash aesthetic. Cinematic widescreen 16:9 landscape, 4K quality.

name: 03_voice_clone
label: 声音克隆·父女
prompt: Two flowing sound waveforms against infinite dark space — a large warm amber wave (father's voice) and a smaller golden wave (daughter's voice) — converging into a glowing crystalline AI orb at center, then re-emerging unified as starlight. Abstract yet emotionally warm, family connection in cold digital cosmos. Cinematic widescreen 16:9 landscape, 4K quality.

name: 04_errors_as_fuel
label: 报错即燃料
prompt: Thirteen red error message fragments scattered across deep cosmic space, each cracking and shattering into golden embers that spiral toward a central protostar being born — blazing gold, immense, illuminating everything around it. Epic cosmic scale, Chinese ink wash sky meets hard science fiction. Cinematic widescreen 16:9 landscape, 4K quality.
